purpose: Recommend ranked analysis workflows from domain guidance, input evidence, and research intent so users or agents can start from plausible pipeline candidates instead of a blank slate.

endpoints.description: Rank candidate workflows for a research question, modality set, or domain-specific analysis request.

dependencies.purpose: Validate and normalize candidate pipeline metadata before recommendation output

sidecar_specification.purpose: Rank candidate scientific workflows against user goals, modalities, and domain hints.

agent_usage.when_to_use: Use when a research request needs one or more plausible workflow starting points chosen from a curated domain catalog.
agent_usage.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a job executor, variant caller, or generic search engine over arbitrary web content.
agent_usage.example_workflow: 1) Provide a research question and optional modalities. 2) Call /pipelines/recommend. 3) Use the ranked workflow ids and rationale in a planning or orchestration step.

common_calls.description: Recommend workflows for a neuroscience question

input_example.query: I have scRNA-seq from brain organoids and want to characterize cell types

failure_modes.condition: No catalog entries match the requested domain or modality constraints
failure_modes.symptom: Empty recommendations array or explicit no-match response
failure_modes.recovery: Broaden the request, add fallback domain guidance, or enrich the catalog

forbidden_behaviors.description: Must not write outside declared scope
Must not make external network calls

agent_notes.implementation_hint: Load curated guidance records, match on domain and modality features, score workflow candidates against the request, and return rationale grounded in the matched evidence fields.
agent_notes.known_gotchas: Catalog guidance often mixes workflow ids, tool names, and explanatory text, so normalize these before ranking or you will produce duplicate or noisy recommendations.
agent_notes.preferred_approach: Treat recommendation as a deterministic ranking over a local catalog with explainable feature matches.
agent_notes.avoid_approach: Do not call external LLMs or execute any pipeline steps from the recommendation engine.

test_cases.name: returns neuroscience workflow match for organoid cell typing

body.query: I have scRNA-seq from brain organoids and want to characterize cell types
